#!/bin/bash

# Change to source directory
cd /ccb_crossrepo/src

# Array of files and their patterns to replace
declare -a FILES=(
    "etcd/client/v3/client.go"
    "etcd/server/embed/etcd.go"
    "etcd/tests/integration/clientv3/naming/resolver_test.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/apis/podresources/client.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/client.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/stub.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/pluginmanager/operationexecutor/operation_generator.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/pluginmanager/pluginwatcher/example_handler.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/probe/grpc/grpc.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/serviceaccount/externaljwt/plugin/keycache_test.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/serviceaccount/externaljwt/plugin/plugin_test.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/serviceaccount/externaljwt/plugin/plugin.go"
    "kubernetes/pkg/volume/csi/csi_client.go"
    "kubernetes/staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/value/encrypt/envelope/grpc_service.go"
    "kubernetes/staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/value/encrypt/envelope/kmsv2/grpc_service.go"
    "kubernetes/staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_image.go"
    "kubernetes/staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_runtime.go"
    "kubernetes/staging/src/k8s.io/kms/pkg/service/grpc_service_test.go"
)

# Process each file
for file in "${FILES[@]}"; do
    if [ -f "$file" ]; then
        echo "Processing $file..."
        
        # Make a copy for comparison
        cp "$file" "$file.orig"
        
        # Replace patterns
        # Pattern 1: grpc.DialContext(ctx, ...) //nolint:staticcheck // TODO: remove for a supported version
        sed -i 's/grpc\.DialContext(\([^,]*\), \([^)]*\), opts\.\.\.) \/\/nolint:staticcheck \/\/ TODO: remove for a supported version/grpc.NewClient(\2, opts...)/g' "$file"
        
        # Pattern 2: grpc.DialContext(ctx, ...) with newlines (multiline)
        # This will be handled separately
        
        # Pattern 3: grpc.Dial(...) calls (non-context versions)
        # We need to be careful not to match DialContext or DialOption
        
        if ! diff -q "$file" "$file.orig" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "  Changes made to $file"
        else
            rm "$file.orig"
        fi
    else
        echo "File not found: $file"
    fi
done

echo "Done!"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/migrate_grpc.sh
/tmp/migrate_grpc.sh

    39→}

    44→// New Prober for execute grpc probe

    50→// Returns the Result status, command output, and errors if any.
    51→// Any failure is considered as a probe failure to mimic grpc_health_probe tool behavior.
    52→// err is always nil
    53→func (p grpcProber) Probe(host, service string, port int, timeout time.Duration) (probe.Result, string, error) {

    76→		} else {

    "kubernetes/staging/src/k8s.io/kms/pkg/service/grpc_service_test.go"
)

# Process each file
for file in "${FILES[@]}"; do
    if [ -f "$file" ]; then
        echo "Processing $file..."
        
        # Make a copy for comparison
        cp "$file" "$file.orig"
        
        # Replace patterns
        # Pattern 1: grpc.DialContext(ctx, ...) //nolint:staticcheck // TODO: remove for a supported version
        sed -i 's/grpc\.DialContext(\([^,]*\), \([^)]*\), opts\.\.\.) \/\/nolint:staticcheck \/\/ TODO: remove for a supported version/grpc.NewClient(\2, opts...)/g' "$file"
        
        # Pattern 2: grpc.DialContext(ctx, ...) with newlines (multiline)
        # This will be handled separately
        
        # Pattern 3: grpc.Dial(...) calls (non-context versions)
        # We need to be careful not to match DialContext or DialOption
        
        if ! diff -q "$file" "$file.orig" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "  Changes made to $file"
        else
            rm "$file.orig"
        fi
    else
        echo "File not found: $file"
    fi
done

echo "Done!"
EOF

            # Apply replacements to get modified content
            modified_content = ''.join(original_lines)
            for old_pattern, new_pattern in patterns:

            modified_lines = modified_content.splitlines(keepends=True)
